AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: I'm a Front-End developer with a Computer Science degree from Shanghai University of Science and Technology. I specialize in Flutter, Vue.js, and Next.js, building cross-platform mobile apps and modern web applications.
AboutPage.description2: My journey in tech started at university in Shanghai where I discovered my passion for programming. Since then, I've built mobile apps with Flutter, web platforms with Vue.js, and continue to grow my skills in modern web development.
